text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A new year has dawned, and with it, the world of
senior races opens up before us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In fact, some big races like the spring Tenno Sho
and Takarazuka Kinen are right around the
corner.
choice_data_list:
(I hope Gold Ship can keep going strong this
year!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With my hopes high for the future, I begin
prepping a training session for Gold Ship... but
she doesn't show up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have no choice but to search the academy for
her. After some time...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: So I've got a question for you, Tickezo.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Even though we're students now, we've got to go
out into the real world someday. What do you
think we'll need when the time comes?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Good question. Hmmmmm... I dunno.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: The answer's simple: we'll need normie power!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What?! What's "normie power"?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'll tell you! It's the ability to fit into society like a
gear and get down to work lickety-split...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You can't go rocking the boat, y'know? You
gotta do what floats people's goats.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense! We wouldn't wanna sink any
goats!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. Now that the preface's outta the way, I
wanna test out my own normie power.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Time to get my lickety-split on!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Quick, come with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't let Gold Ship out of my sight, so I do my
best to keep up with them.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Behold, a train station. The battlefield of the
normies.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: B-battlefield?! How so?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it obvious? There are rules for riding trains.
No matter what befalls you within those walls,
you can't make a scene.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You may be starving or get the sudden urge to
whistle, but you have to endure that suffering.
That's what normies do.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wow! Normies sure have it rough!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Today, we walk in their shoes. It's time to prove
we can fit into society.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I challenge you to see who can stay quiet the
longest on the train!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Y-you're on! Sounds hard, but I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And you, Trainer! Don't think I didn't notice you
standing there, spying on us the whole time!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's on you to see this battle to the end!
Determine the winner of our contest, and
therefore who fits into society better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I got roped into overseeing Gold
Ship's battle with Winning Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click clack... Click clack...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fifteen seconds in...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...I-I have to focus... Crab, shrimp, squid,
octopus...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ngggh... I'm a normie! I'm a normie!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thirty seconds in...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Scallop, sea bream, shrimp, dolphin... Crap!
Dolphins are mammals!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Normies don't panic. Play it cool, nice and easy,
smooth and steady!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Forty-five seconds in...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
How could a self-proclaimed marine biology
expert like myself make such a rookie mistake?!
The shame! The shaaammme...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I gotta hold still! Hold still, hold still, hold still! Nrghhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, after just one minute...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship and Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
GAAAAAH!
I can't take it anymooore!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The doors have hardly begun to open before
they're squeezing themselves out onto the
platform.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I-I couldn't breathe in there! I thought I was a goner for suuure!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'll never take breathing for granted ever
again!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And if there's just one more thing that'll stick with
me after today...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's that dolphins are mammals! That's one mix-up
I won't be making again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The competition is over before I can declare a
winner...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship vs. Winning Ticket: draw! (To be
continued...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, Gold Ship has yet another strange
dream.
"Ship of gold, resting beneath the waves..."

"Your quarry draws near... Radiant, uncharted
territory awaits your arrival..."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Mmm... What was that?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know. It was probably another dream about
that Eden thingy.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But man, I know I've heard that voice
somewhere...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hmm... It makes me feel weirdly nostalgic...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Gold Ship. Quite late to rise
today, aren't we?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Morni―hm?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
(Funny... McQueen makes me feel the same sense
of nostalgia as my dream...)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's just like the smell of the tatami mats at my
gramps's place...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I beg your pardon?! I hope you're not speaking about me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
(No, hang on. McQueen smells slightly
different...)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
(If I had to say, my dream reminded me more of
like... the smell of dirty socks after a hard day's
work.)
